mechanistic_hypotheses.hypothesis: TCF7L2 modulates pathway response under varying exposure burden.
mechanistic_hypotheses.supporting_evidence: Curated integration of association, pathway, and epidemiologic evidence supports this relationship.

molecular_function: Pathway-level interaction under variable exposure conditions
name: Transcription Factor 7 Like 2

regulatory_notes.enhancer_associations: TCF7L2 has enhancer associations in inflammatory and disease-linked contexts.
regulatory_notes.methylation_sensitivity: TCF7L2 expression may shift with methylation dynamics and exposure burden.
regulatory_notes.promoter_activity: TCF7L2 promoter activity is context-sensitive across curated tissue settings.

summary: TCF7L2 is modeled as a disease-relevant locus that links inherited architecture, pathway activity, and environmental sensitivity in GENARCH educational outputs.
